key_items: Senate Banking Committee advances CLARITY Act 15-9 with bipartisan support, clearing major regulatory hurdle for crypto legislation
Strategy's STRC Bitcoin acquisition machine accumulates 818,869 BTC ($66B position) with $1.5B trading volume spike fueling mid-month rallies
Bitcoin surges past $82K on regulatory clarity catalyst as institutional adoption accelerates through preferred share dividend structures (SATA/STRC)
reasoning: The CLARITY Act's advancement through Senate Banking Committee represents the most significant regulatory tailwind for crypto in years, removing existential uncertainty and opening institutional capital floodgates. Combined with Strategy's massive ongoing Bitcoin accumulation program (818K+ BTC) and new financial instruments (SATA daily dividends at 13%), macro conditions are aligning for sustained upside momentum despite short-term profit-taking at $82K resistance.
risks: Bitcoin has failed three breakout attempts above $82K with elevated short-term holder selling, and profit-taking on Ethereum (3-week high realized profits) could indicate broader market fatigue that spreads to BTC if CLARITY Act fails in full Senate vote or faces unexpected legislative setbacks.
